summary: While the role offers an ideal 9-to-5 schedule and excellent work-life balance, it presents a significant mismatch for your professional strengths and preference for procedural work. The position requires complex logical deduction and high-stakes analytical reasoning, which are areas where you have indicated you struggle. Furthermore, the high stress of legal liability and the isolation of an 'internal police' role may undermine the personal wellbeing you are prioritizing.
